raw_input:
[4.0/5] Not what I expected but... When I ordered this, I thought it was a regular ol' hose nozzle. It's not -- you can actually attach it to a pressure washer as well. I was not overly impressed with this at first. The pressure washer attachment came connected to the hose nozzle and it was an absolute pain to remove (my husband had to use pliers to get it out). It was easy enough to attach to the hose but somewhat a pain to take off. It also only seems to have 2 spray patterns, not 4 like advertised (a hard "line" spray and a softer line spray).

I was not comfortable spraying my flowers with this because it seemed to spray fairly hard, even when I turned the nozzle to reduce the spray. So, I started spraying off the mold on my sidewalk. Our house faces north and is fairly shaded in the front and, since it rains a lot in Florida, tends to get mold build-up on the front sidewalks. As you can see from the picture I posted, this nozzle does actually help spray off mold. It's not quite a pressure washer but it was able to remove the heavy stuff (but, remember, it does come with the pressure washer attachment). I am giving this four stars because it's not quite what I expected but it does help remove mold from cement, which makes it worth having. [5.0/5] Heavy Duty This is a very heavy duty hose nozzle. It four spray adjustments are easy to make. It came with a quick attachment. The parts are brass, which means years of use. Powerful spray. Excellent product. [5.0/5] Great water pressure This hose head is really made well. It’s solid metal and has a nice heavy duty feel to it. I was a little confused at first because it comes with that smaller screw in attachment already screwed into the base. I almost though I got something that wasn’t for a garden hose but you just need to unscrew it an take that piece out if your using with a standard garden house.

The water stream comes out very strong and it is adjustable by turning the head. It does have the little metal clip so you can lock it and not have to keep holding the handle down. What I really like though is the water pressure aspect. I’ve been using those expandable garden hoses and they tend to not give you much pressure. This head really gives you the extra pressure and makes it so I can reach the further spots of the yard. I’m very impressed with this. All around it’s a well made product. [5.0/5] Durable! We've always had the plastic cheap kinds so thought this might be an interesting replacement and we were right! It feels really good in the hand and comes w/ the little rubber washers to keep a seal and works very well! It feels well made, no drips yet. Only thing is, we -really- have to remember to take it off and inside down here in Texas because ohhh, it will get very hot otherwise! But just one more reason for us to take good care of it and bring it in when not in use! [5.0/5] This is a BEAUTIFUL design, and very ergonomic The first thing I noticed when I unpacked this nozzle was its WEIGHT. Then its BEAUTIFUL "liquid" sleek design. And then its Ergonomics -- how nicely it fits in my hand!! It fits in such a way that my hand does not get tired from holding and operating it -- which means I get to spend more time using it.

What a contrast between this (fairly inexpensive!!) beautiful hose nozzle and the usual plastic ones you find at your local hardware and garden stores!!

I can't fault the price - it is WORTH it for such a beautiful and very functional nozzle. It attaches easily to the hose, the spray patterns are well-thought-out -- settings that range from washing and flushing dirt and grit from the car and all its crevices, to a setting that gently mists plants or dogs. [4.0/5] Garden spray Nozzle The only issue I have is because it is not covered with any insulated material, the metal gets really cold especially if you are using it in a cool day. Otherwise, it is good. [5.0/5] Easy to connect to regular threaded hoses or a quick connect. Jet is powerful and spray is gently. This is a vey well made spray nozzle. This is able to to be as a quick release or you can remove the attachment and thread it on to a regular hose without any issues. It comes with 2 extra rubber washers to help prevent leaking while in use. All you do is twist the tip go the nozzle to change it from a spar to a jet stream. The jet is fairly powerful and does a good job at cleaning porches ,driveways house siding, etc. Just be careful on paint, especially old paint while on the jet stream as it can and will likely chip away pieces of paint. This is very well made, very durable, and works as you would expect. I have only used it a few times now but I give it a spritz of wd-40 when I am done to help prevent it form rusting, This could be overkill but it is showing no signs of rust. This does a good job of cleaning off siding and in the spray function it does well at watering flowers too. This is an overall good spray nozzle and should last quite some time. [5.0/5] All metal has its pros and cons. Nicely made and sturdy with a good finish. The operation has been smooth, and its design with the valve directly in the middle should be a more durable design than a spray nozzle that relies on a pull piston.

The brass tip screws in and out to adjust the spray pattern, from a gentle mist to a sharp stream. No flat or rectangular spray patterns; just the basics. The extra hose washers are a nice bonus. I did not use the quick connect, as I don't have a standard female connector; it unscrews easily.

But I currently can't use it for one major reason -- the weather. It's been around 100 degrees in recent weeks, and with the hot water comes a very hot metal spray nozzle -- so hot that I feel like I'll burn my hands, even though this has been left in the shade. That goes with any all metal nozzle, though, so I'm not docking my rating; it's just something to consider when choosing a spray nozzle. 5 stars (except right now in the summer). [5.0/5] Heavy duty and solid feel Quite impressed with this sprayer, it feels heavy duty and has a good finish on it. It comes with a few extra gaskets so there are no leaks from the connectors. The spring action handle is solid and easy to use. The adjustable spraying pattern makes it ideal to use on a large garden or on potted plants. [2.0/5] Looks nice, but POOR quality Used it for 5 minutes, worked nice...until i dropped it. Broke the trigger pin immediately. An outdoor hose nozzle should be able to take a fall. Junk [4.0/5] Nice all metal sprayer This is a fully adjustable sprayer nozzle, so there is really more than four spray patterns. A little buckle can hold the spray handle in the on position so that your fingers do not get tired. The only thing I needed to do is change the quick connect to the type of quick connect adapters that we use on our water hoses. We have quite a collection of spray nozzles and this one is the fanciest looking. [4.0/5] Super heavy duty This nozzle is super built to last. It’s rather heavy but I know it will withstand the much abuse. My only worry is we have hard water and sometimes that eats away at our nozzles over time. Great product that will last though! [5.0/5] Very heavy duty! Really nice heavy duty garden hose. My husband was even impressed by it. It's very solid, and heavy, definitely doesn't feel like it will be breaking anytime soon. It's easy to fit to your hose and to use. You can adjust the water spray, and it has the lock feature so that you can keep the water running without holding the handle down. Overall I think this sprayer has it all! [5.0/5] Heavy Duty I was delightfully surprised by the heft of this spray nozzle! It has a nice weight to it and I can tell it's well-made to last a long time. I have been through 4 hose nozzles in the last year and most are made from cheap plastic that cracks, rendering them useless. But THIS Growom Garden Hose Nozzle works wonderfully, was easy to install, and is NOT made of plastic! It's a winner for me. [5.0/5] It's a very nice nozzle As most of the reviews state, this is a heavy duty metal spray head. HOWEVER, if you think that you can just remove the male quick connect and thread the spray head directly onto your hose, you are WRONG!!! The threads of the hose do not mate with the threads of the spray head. Hopefully, the one I received is defective and this is not a design flaw.

Update.... The seller contacted me to let me know that they shipped the European model, with metric threads, to the USA Amazon distribution center by mistake. They corrected the mistake and now I have a great hose nozzle that threads onto my American hose. Who knew hose threads were not standard around the world. [1.0/5] Useless low quality product. Arrived broken. Terrible product. Came broken. Can’t even use [5.0/5] delivered promptly, good quality it was delivered promptly and is of good quality - strong.

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Overall, most customers are very happy with this heavy-duty metal hose nozzle, praising its solid construction, weight, and durability compared to cheap plastic alternatives. Many highlight its ergonomic design, adjustable spray patterns, locking handle feature, and the included extra rubber washers. Customers appreciate that it can connect to both standard garden hoses and pressure washers via a quick-connect attachment.

The most common complaints and concerns are about temperature sensitivity, since being all metal means it gets very hot in summer sun and very cold on cool days. A few customers also noted that removing the pressure washer attachment can be difficult and may require pliers. There was some confusion about the dual-connection setup, with several buyers initially unsure how to attach it to a standard garden hose.

There were a small number of negative experiences. One customer received a broken product, another had theirs break after a single drop, and one received a European model with metric threads that did not fit a standard American hose, though the seller resolved that issue by sending a replacement.

The spray pattern adjustability received mixed feedback, with some saying it offers more than four settings and others feeling it only provides two usable patterns despite four being advertised. Overall, the majority of buyers consider it a well-made, durable product worth the price.
